name: Mom Block's Stuffed Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the cabbage head, covered, for about 5 minutes so that the leaves are soft enough to roll.
2. Prepare the meat filling: Combine meat, salt, 1 grated onion, lemon juice, and rice.
3. For cocktail-sized stuffed cabbage, cut cabbage leaves in half and fill with about 1 tablespoon of meat filling. Fold the top of the leaf over to cover the meat, fold both sides over, and roll tightly.
4. Prepare the sauce: Combine the remaining chopped onion, tomato sauce, tomato paste, chili sauce, grape jam, and salt.
5. Line a large pot with a few outside cabbage leaves to prevent the stuffed cabbages from sticking or burning. Arrange loose ends down to prevent unrolling. Add the sauce and enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 2 1/2 - 3 hours.
6. Cabbage can also be shredded more finely and added to the pot with other ingredients to make cabbage soup!
